title: Expense Tracker
description: An AI-driven expense tracking app for scanning receipts and analyzing spending patterns. You can also talk to a chatbot for insights or management of your expenses. It uses Qwen3.5 for both OCR and Chatbot, powered by Ollama.

title: Transit Times
description: A successor to my SG Bus Times API for Garmin, this web app extends its coverage of providing real-time transit information for Vienna, and potentially other popular cities.

title: LottoMiner
description: My first Ruby on Rails project, a simple tool to analyze historical PCSO lotto data. I know lotto is entirely random and unpredictable, but at that point I was curious about patterns and trends in the data.

title: Data Grove
description: A data pipeline and dashboard for analyzing environmental sensor data collected from forest monitoring stations. Ingests CSV and JSON feeds, runs anomaly detection, and presents trends through interactive charts. Built with Python for the backend ETL and D3.js for the visualization layer.
